title: AI Helpers Configuration
description: Schema for config/ai_helpers.yaml and the sub-files in config/ai_helpers/. Each top-level key is either a YAML anchor string (_behavioral_*), a PersonaConfig object (identified by the presence of 'role_ref'), or a language lookup table (language_specific_*).

additionalProperties.description: Each entry is a string anchor, a PersonaConfig, or a language lookup table.

PersonaConfig.title: PersonaConfig
PersonaConfig.description: A single AI persona entry. Mirrors the PersonaConfig TypeScript interface in olinda_prompter/.workflow_core/src/types.ts.

role_ref.description: Key referencing an entry in prompt_roles.yaml roles map.

behavioral_guidelines.description: YAML anchor alias for shared behavioral guidelines (resolved from _behavioral_* anchors).

task_template.description: Prompt template string with optional {variable} placeholders.

approach.description: Step-by-step methodology text injected into the prompt.

specific_expertise.description: Domain-specific expertise context for the persona.

commit_types.description: Commit type definitions (used by commit-oriented personas).

LanguageTable.title: LanguageTable
LanguageTable.description: A language-keyed lookup table (language_specific_documentation, language_specific_quality, language_specific_testing).
